changeSet.author: sisyphus
changeSet.comment: Phase H: Migrate legacy audit_log_event data to new audit_log table. Maps legacy audit_log_event_type IDs to AuditEventType enum values, preserving all historical audit records in the new schema.
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO audit_log ( study_id, event_type, entity_type, entity_id, entity_label, old_value, new_value, performed_by, performed_date, details, source_module ) SELECT NULL::INT AS study_id, CASE ale.audit_log_event_type_id WHEN 1 THEN 'UPDATE' WHEN 2 THEN 'CREATE' WHEN 3 THEN 'UPDATE' WHEN 4 THEN 'UPDATE' WHEN 5 THEN 'CREATE' WHEN 6 THEN 'UPDATE' WHEN 7 THEN 'UPDATE' WHEN 8 THEN 'UPDATE' WHEN 9 THEN 'UPDATE' WHEN 10 THEN 'CREATE' WHEN 11 THEN 'UPDATE' WHEN 12 THEN 'UPDATE' WHEN 13 THEN 'DELETE' WHEN 14 THEN 'UPDATE' WHEN 15 THEN 'UPDATE' WHEN 16 THEN 'UPDATE' WHEN 17 THEN 'CREATE' WHEN 18 THEN 'UPDATE' WHEN 19 THEN 'UPDATE' WHEN 20 THEN 'UPDATE' WHEN 21 THEN 'UPDATE' WHEN 22 THEN 'LOCK' WHEN 23 THEN 'DELETE' WHEN 24 THEN 'UPDATE' WHEN 25 THEN 'UPDATE' WHEN 26 THEN 'LOCK' WHEN 27 THEN 'UPDATE' WHEN 28 THEN 'CREATE' WHEN 29 THEN 'UPDATE' WHEN 30 THEN 'CREATE' WHEN 31 THEN 'SYSTEM' WHEN 32 THEN 'UPDATE' WHEN 33 THEN 'CREATE' WHEN 40 THEN 'UPDATE' WHEN 41 THEN 'UPDATE' WHEN 42 THEN 'CREATE' WHEN 43 THEN 'UPDATE' ELSE 'SYSTEM' END AS event_type, ale.audit_table AS entity_type, ale.entity_id::BIGINT AS entity_id, ale.entity_name AS entity_label, ale.old_value, ale.new_value, ale.user_id AS performed_by, ale.audit_date AS performed_date, ale.reason_for_change AS details, 'legacy' AS source_module FROM audit_log_event ale LEFT JOIN audit_log al_new ON al_new.entity_type = ale.audit_table AND al_new.entity_id = ale.entity_id::BIGINT AND al_new.performed_date = ale.audit_date AND al_new.performed_by = ale.user_id WHERE al_new.id IS NULL ORDER BY ale.audit_id;

changeSet.author: sisyphus
changeSet.comment: Record migration completion count for observability
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO audit_log ( event_type, entity_type, entity_label, performed_by, performed_date, details, source_module ) SELECT 'SYSTEM' AS event_type, 'Migration' AS entity_type, 'audit_log_event → audit_log' AS entity_label, NULL::INT AS performed_by, NOW() AS performed_date, (SELECT COUNT(*)::TEXT || ' records migrated from audit_log_event to audit_log' FROM audit_log WHERE source_module = 'legacy') AS details, 'system' AS source_module;
